items.title: Solana Company, Jito Foundation target institutional Solana staking expansion in Asia
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Jito Foundation's focus on institutional staking in Asia could enhance Solana's liquidity and attract significant capital inflows into the ecosystem.

items.title: Solana treasury firm invests $25 mln into OnRe yield strategy: ‘Natural extension’
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $25 million investment into OnRe's yield strategy signals confidence in Solana's market potential and may boost user engagement and ecosystem growth.

items.title: How Solana Exchange Drift Plans to Repay Users After $295 Million Crypto Hack
items.whyYouShouldCare: Drift's plan to repay users after the hack is crucial for restoring trust and stability, which is essential for maintaining user confidence in Solana's security.
